description_long: This is a modern gaming laptop with a sleek, angular design and a matte gray finish. The lid features a distinctive illuminated logo and two accent lines, both glowing in a teal color, which add a futuristic touch. The keyboard is backlit with teal lighting, and the keys are clearly marked, including a full function row and a numeric keypad. The screen is open and displays a vibrant gaming interface, suggesting high performance and entertainment capabilities. The laptop's chassis appears to be made primarily of metal and plastic, with visible ventilation grilles and several ports along the sides. The overall build is slim yet robust, suitable for both urban workspaces and on-the-go use.
description: A sleek, matte gray gaming laptop with teal backlit keyboard and illuminated logo, featuring a vibrant screen and robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the open screen, backlit keyboard, and visible side ports.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the illuminated logo and accent lines on the lid.
description_view_2: Right side view with the open screen, keyboard, and additional side ports visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full keyboard layout, trackpad, and the active screen with gaming content.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized, illuminated logo resembling an eye with two angled lines, located at the center of the laptop lid.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful gaming interface with visible application windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a full function row, numeric keypad, and teal backlighting.
